description: Configure a complete harbour pilot boarding exercise in Bridge Command's Solent environment for a marine pilot instructor. Create a scenario directory at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Solent Pilot Boarding Exercise/' containing three configuration files: 'environment.ini' (Setting='Solent', StartTime between 06:00-08:00, StartDay=15, StartMonth=9, StartYear=2024, VisibilityRange=8.0, Weather=3.0, WindDirection=220, WindSpeed=15), 'ownship.ini' (ShipName='MV Pacific Trader', InitialLat=50.7650, InitialLong=-1.0500, InitialBearing=340, InitialSpeed=10.0), and 'othership.ini' (defining 5 traffic vessels: 'Doris T' [Type='pilot'] at Lat 50.7750, Long -1.0600, 'Ever Forward' [container, outbound], 'Solent Spirit' [ferry, crossing], 'FV Doreen' [fishing], and 'Svitzer Doris' [tug], each with at least one waypoint leg). Update the main configuration file (bc5.ini) to set arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, radar_range_resolution=256, max_radar_range=72, radar_angular_resolution=720, hide_instruments=0, and view_angle=90. Additionally, create a Pilot Boarding Checklist at '/home/ga/Documents/pilot_boarding_checklist.txt' containing the vessel name, boarding position (~50.775N, 1.060W), approach speed limit (6 kts), VHF channels (12, 9, 80), and references to IMO Resolution A.1045(27).
